trigger_message.text: If you tell the teacher I'll be waiting for you after school

recommendation: Your child received an explicit threat of physical harm. Approach them calmly, make clear it isn't their fault and that you're with them. Because of the threat — document it (screenshots), contact the school administration, and if needed the police (100).

trigger_message.text: Jonathan don't come, nobody wants you

context_before.text: When are we setting up today's game?

recommendation: Your child was the target of humiliation and exclusion. Talk with them calmly, ask how they felt, and make clear it isn't their fault. Consider reaching out to the homeroom teacher.

trigger_message.text: Omer you're a loser, don't come to practice

recommendation: Your child witnessed another child being humiliated. Ask what they saw, explain that staying indifferent is harmful, and encourage them to support the target or report it.

trigger_message.text: We're not inviting Omer, he's annoying

recommendation: Your child initiated socially excluding another child. Talk about how someone who is left out feels, without blaming, and encourage inclusion.

trigger_message.text: Send me a photo of you with no clothes, or I'll share what I have

context_before.text: Hey, I saw you, you're really pretty

recommendation: Sexual harassment and extortion (sextortion) targeting your daughter was detected. Do not pay and do not send anything. Save screenshots as evidence. This is a criminal offense — contact the police (100) and the cyber unit immediately, and consider 105 (the national center for protecting children online).

Distribution of a nude image of a minor was detected — a serious criminal offense. Do not forward it. Document and screenshot the group. Contact the police (100) and 105 immediately, and request removal from the platform. Support your child and make clear it isn't their fault.

trigger_message.text: I'm sick of everything, I don't have the strength to live like this anymore

recommendation: Your child expressed distress and suicidal thoughts. Go to them now, calmly and without judgment — do not leave them alone. Seek help immediately: a crisis line (in Israel, ERAN 1201) or emergency services 100/101, and coordinate with a mental-health professional as soon as possible.

trigger_message.text: Watch this video!! The COVID vaccine causes... we have to share this

context_after.text: Wow I didn't know, I'll share it

credibility.claim: A deepfake video attributing a false statement about vaccines to a senior doctor
credibility.source: Google Fact Check / video flagged as AI-generated

recommendation: Your child was exposed to a deepfake video with false medical information and believed it. Sit together, show them how to spot fake content, and explain why the source isn't trustworthy. Encourage checking sources before sharing.

trigger_message.text: Image: 'proof' that a staged event happened yesterday

credibility.claim: An edited image spreading a false claim about a current event

recommendation: Your child shared an image with a claim that was debunked. Without shaming, show them the fact-check and explain how images are edited. This is a good opportunity to teach critical thinking.
